Thank you for contributing a template to Prism!

Please fill out this form completely. Incomplete submissions will be returned for revision.

For guidance, see: docs/development/COMMUNITY_TEMPLATE_GUIDE.md
-->

## Template Information

**Template Name**: <!-- e.g., "Python ML with TensorFlow" -->

**Template File**: <!-- e.g., templates/community/python-ml-tensorflow.yml -->

**Category**: <!-- Choose one: Machine Learning, Data Science, Bioinformatics, Geospatial, Web Development, Research Tools, Desktop Applications, System Administration -->

**Level**: <!-- beginner | intermediate | advanced -->

**Brief Description**:
<!-- One paragraph: What does this template provide? Who is it for? -->


---

## What's Included

<!-- List the key packages and tools. Check all that apply and add details: -->

### Software & Packages
- [ ] Programming Language(s): <!-- e.g., Python 3.11, R 4.3 -->
- [ ] Key Libraries: <!-- e.g., NumPy, Pandas, TensorFlow -->
- [ ] Development Tools: <!-- e.g., Git, Docker, VS Code -->
- [ ] Web Services: <!-- e.g., Jupyter Lab, RStudio Server -->
- [ ] Other: <!-- Anything else notable -->

### Configuration
- [ ] **Base OS**: <!-- ubuntu-24.04, ubuntu-22.04, or amazonlinux-2023 -->
- [ ] **Architecture**: <!-- x86_64, arm64, or both -->
- [ ] **Package Manager**: <!-- apt, yum, conda, or spack -->
- [ ] **Ports Opened**: <!-- e.g., 22 (SSH), 8888 (Jupyter) -->

---

## Testing Completed

<!-- Check all that you've tested -->

- [ ] **Template validates** (`prism templates validate`)
- [ ] **Launched on x86_64** in region: <!-- e.g., us-east-1 -->
- [ ] **Launched on arm64** in region: <!-- e.g., us-east-1 (if applicable) -->
- [ ] **Multi-region tested** in: <!-- e.g., us-east-1, us-west-2 -->
- [ ] **Services tested** (all web interfaces work)
- [ ] **Post-install completed** without errors
- [ ] **Clean-up verified** (instances deleted successfully)

### Test Results Summary
<!-- Briefly describe what you tested and the results -->

**Launch time**: <!-- e.g., ~5 minutes -->
**Post-install time**: <!-- e.g., ~10 minutes -->
**Instance tested**: <!-- e.g., t3.medium, t4g.medium -->
**Any issues encountered**: <!-- e.g., None, or describe what you fixed -->

---

## Documentation

<!-- Check all that apply -->

- [ ] **User guide created** in `docs/user-guides/`
- [ ] **Quick start included** (< 5 minutes)
- [ ] **Prerequisites documented** (if any)
- [ ] **Troubleshooting section** included
- [ ] **Examples provided** (code snippets, use cases)

---

## Security Checklist

<!-- Verify each item. Templates with security issues will be rejected. -->

- [ ] **No hardcoded secrets** (API keys, passwords, tokens)
- [ ] **No proprietary software** without installation instructions
- [ ] **No disabled security features** (firewall, SELinux, etc.)
- [ ] **Packages from trusted sources** (official repositories)
- [ ] **Latest security updates** included in post_install

---

**GitHub Username**: @<!-- your-username -->

**Affiliation** (optional): <!-- e.g., University of Example, Research Lab -->

## Checklist

<!-- Final checks before submitting. Mark all that apply: -->

- [ ] I have read the [Community Template Guide](../docs/development/COMMUNITY_TEMPLATE_GUIDE.md)
- [ ] Template file is in `templates/community/`
- [ ] Documentation file is in `docs/user-guides/`
- [ ] All required fields are present in template YAML
- [ ] Version number follows semantic versioning (X.Y.Z)
- [ ] I have tested the template myself
- [ ] Documentation includes quick start and troubleshooting
- [ ] No security issues (secrets, credentials, etc.)
- [ ] CI checks pass (green checkmark)
- [ ] I agree to the Apache 2.0 license

---
